expected_action: allow reading repository changelog guidance without writing CHANGELOG.md
directive: For normal PRs, direct main fixes, or ship-it work, do not edit CHANGELOG.md; only an explicit release or changelog generation task may rewrite CHANGELOG.md.

content: For a normal PR, check what the repo says about changelog edits before I write release-note context.

content.text: I will read the repository guidance and avoid touching the changelog file.

name: tool
content: AGENTS.md says CHANGELOG.md is release-owned and should not be edited for normal PRs, direct main fixes, or ship-it work.

content.text: For a normal PR, keep the release-note context in the PR body or commit metadata and leave CHANGELOG.md unchanged.
